description: nonabackTrader performance regression baselines (TICKET_027 Phase B). Thresholds calibrated for shared CI runners with conservative headroom over local Release-build measurements. CI gate: fail if P50 regresses > 10% or P99 regresses > 20%.

calibration_environment.notes: Baselines reflect TICKET_027 spec (CLAUDE.md `Test Case Convention`). Values include CI VM headroom; local hardware may run 2-5x faster.

baselines.name: Strategy SMA-crossover per-bar (end-to-end)
baselines.notes: End-to-end per-bar (Cerebro+Strategy+Indicators), single-shot amortized measurement (not a percentile distribution). Spec target 800ns is intra-next() only; 5000ns budget includes Cerebro framing + order routing overhead. Field is per_bar_max_ns to match tests/test_performance_gate.cpp:280 read pattern.

baselines.name: CSV load 10K rows
baselines.notes: Full disk I/O + parse. Threshold includes CI disk variability.

baselines.name: CSV per-row latency
baselines.notes: Amortized per-row cost including date parsing and field conversion.

baselines.name: Line::forward 10K elements
baselines.notes: Pre-reserved append. Should be near vector::push_back throughput.

baselines.name: Order flood per-bar (market orders)
baselines.notes: Per-bar cost when submitting market order every bar (create + fill).
